activationGate: Do not start production until Archer Pilot Acceptance and an explicit later production task.

reusable: motion test harness and state switching
sharedTechnicalBaseline.rule: Technical reuse does not approve old visual frames.

slime.activeGameEvidence: Map 1 active normal enemy in stages 1-2; current encounter record has no skillIds.

existingInventory.knownSemantics: 8 frames, 512x512 RGBA, 12 FPS, loop, anchor [0.5,0.9], in-place, footstepCue@0.7, canonicalApproved=false
existingInventory.migrationDecision: Run exact reduced-size identity comparison against approved Slime style anchor/new neutral master. Reuse only with explicit exact-file approval and compatible provenance; otherwise redo from the new master.

existingInventory.knownSemantics: 8 frames, 512x512 RGBA, 8 FPS, loop, anchor [0.5,0.9], in-place, no markers, runtimeFlipX=true, canonicalApproved=false
existingInventory.migrationDecision: Same conditional reuse gate as Move; do not promote because old technical validation passed.
Create a readable deformable-body attack after source identity lock; squash/stretch may be a core method when it reads as an attack rather than idle/move.

runtimeBindingState.idle: technically integrated on PR #56 read-only runtime line; canonicalApproved=false
runtimeBindingState.move: legacy/pilot motion-test path exists and was x4-tested earlier; not a new-style exact production approval

slime.skillMotionNow: NOT_REQUIRED_NOW because current Map 1 encounter record has skillIds=[]; use core Idle+Move+BasicAttack first.

golem.activeGameEvidence: Current Map 1 data uses Golem as a normal enemy on stages 7-14 and as a Stage 5 miniboss-pool member, so movement and attack both matter.

existingInventory.knownSemantics: 8 frames, 640x640 RGBA, 12 FPS, non-loop, anchor [0.5,0.94], in-place, impactCue@0.75, canonicalApproved=false
existingInventory.knownConflict: Legacy motion test used 8 frames / impactCue@0.75 while earlier plan/contract targeted a different frame count/timing; new production must derive timing from actual heavy-impact pose and current gameplay contract, not blindly copy either value.
existingInventory.migrationDecision: Redo from a newly approved compact/chunky Golem neutral master; old attack may be used as motion/readability reference only.

existingInventory.knownSemantics: 8 frames, 640x640 RGBA, 8 FPS, loop, anchor [0.5,0.94], in-place, no markers, runtimeFlipX=true, canonicalApproved=false
existingInventory.migrationDecision: Redo from new approved Golem master; preserve weight/readability lessons, not old pixels.
Create weighted in-place locomotion because current Golem appears in normal encounters and must approach targets.

runtimeBindingState.idle: technically integrated on PR #56 read-only runtime line; visual is replacement-planned
runtimeBindingState.attack: legacy motion-test state was x4-tested; visual is replacement-planned and marker/timing needs reconciliation
runtimeBindingState.move: no dedicated approved production package found

golem.fastMigrationPotential: MEDIUM_AFTER_NEW_MASTER; core packages need new production
golem.skillMotionNow: REQUIRED_LATER by default; current Golem has skill.monster_stone_guard, but a distinct skill animation should only be produced when gameplay/readability requires a separate visual beyond fallback.

classificationLegend.REUSABLE: Technical schema/tool/runtime behavior may be reused without approving visual bytes.
classificationLegend.PLACEHOLDER: Technical or legacy fallback; not final visual.
classificationLegend.REFERENCE_ONLY: Useful for pose/readability/provenance, never automatically promotable.
classificationLegend.PRODUCTION_READY: Would require current exact identity + technical + visual approval; neither pilot is marked production-ready here.
classificationLegend.NEEDS_REDO: New visual package required from an approved current master.

postArcherMigrationSequence.name: Source / Identity Lock
parallelWork: Slime: exact compare existing Idle/Move against current style anchor and candidate neutral master; approve one exact neutral master
Golem: create/review/approve one new compact chunky neutral master in a later production task

postArcherMigrationSequence.name: Idle + Move Batch
parallelWork: Slime: reuse/repackage approved-compatible Idle/Move only if exact style gate passes; otherwise redo both
Golem: redo Idle and create missing Move from new master in one CC batch task as two isolated packages
postArcherMigrationSequence.shared: common technical validation and combined review presentation

postArcherMigrationSequence.name: Basic Attack Production
parallelWork: Golem: redo heavy attack with strong anticipation, impact and recovery
postArcherMigrationSequence.markerRule: Use semantic marker only when needed and map to actual visual event; do not blindly inherit legacy normalized times.

postArcherMigrationSequence.name: Batch Technical Validation
postArcherMigrationSequence.work: Run common validator plus SMALL_CREATURE and HEAVY_CONSTRUCT motion-specific gates; packages remain isolated.

postArcherMigrationSequence.name: User Review
postArcherMigrationSequence.work: One combined mobile-friendly review page; approve/reject each package independently.

postArcherMigrationSequence.name: Exact Approval
postArcherMigrationSequence.work: Lock hashes/semantics per approved package; failed packages branch to isolated redo without blocking passed packages.

postArcherMigrationSequence.name: Runtime Migration
postArcherMigrationSequence.work: CC imports only approved packages through PR #56-style seams, with per-unit/state rollback and exactly 3 targeted x4 checkpoints.

explicitNonGoalsNow: promote old motion tests to production
